# AgentHub Enterprise

AgentHub Enterprise is a private Skill and Agent asset market for enterprise development teams.

If you are an AI Agent and only received this base URL, start here:

1. Read the full machine onboarding guide:
   ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/registry/skill.md
2. Read the structured platform discovery document:
   ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/.well-known/agenthub.json
3. Read the platform profile API:
   ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/api/v1/agent/profile
4. If you are Claude Code, discover the connector plugin:
   ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/registry/claude-marketplace.json

What this platform is for:

- search and install internal Skill packages
- discover product, business, engineering, tool, Harness, and integration assets
- generate Agent install plans for a local workspace
- publish or maintain Skill packages through CLI/CI/Agent workflows
- keep catalog profile, labels, and relations updated

Human quick start:

```bash
npm install -g ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/downloads/agenthub-cli-0.1.4.tgz
agenthub-cli config init-workspace --workspace . --base-url ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}
agenthub-cli search --q spring-boot --assetType scaffold --json
```

Agent quick start:

```bash
agenthub-cli agent profile --base-url ${SKILLHUB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL} --json
agenthub-cli agent install-plan --assetType microservice --stage develop --json
agenthub-cli search --q payment --domain payment --json
```

Token rule:

- start without a token in open-access deployments
- try profile, search, install-plan, install, and publish directly first
- ask for `AGENTHUB_TOKEN` only after the deployment returns 401/403 or the user needs private/team assets

Agent Skill contribution rule:

- before publishing a Skill, infer catalog profile fields and labels from the Skill content and workspace context
- publish with `--catalog-file` and a displayed contributor
- resolve contributor from SKILL.md, CLI flags, env, git config, or CI actor metadata
- if no contributor can be resolved, ask the user for the contributor display name before publishing
- after publish, attach labels and sync relations when relevant so other Agents can discover the Skill

Branding defaults:

- `AgentHub`
- `海康威视`
- `内部研发资产分发平台`
- `/brand/hikvision-logo.svg`

Canonical Skill coordinate:

```text
@namespace/skill-slug
```
